title: Accessible Context Menu

statement.markdown:
Users should be able to access your web application's context menu without relying on visual cues.
Your context menu should be navigable using a keyboard and have a clear focus state.
Your context menu should be dismissible using the 'Escape' key or the close button.
Your context menu should stay open even if the user clicks outside of it.

constraints: Do not use any external libraries or frameworks.
Your solution should work on desktop and laptop computers with Windows, macOS, and Linux operating systems.
Your solution should be optimized for ARIA compliance.

gradingCriteria.description: The context menu is navigable using a keyboard and has a clear focus state.
The context menu is dismissible using the 'Escape' key or the close button.
The context menu stays open even if the user clicks outside of it.
The context menu has a visually appealing design.
